IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANDURAY, ADILIA, INDIVIDUALLY, AND AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM OF ELISA ROJAS, A MINOR BRENES, LETICIA GUEVARA, RENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCANN, KATHLEEN MCCANN, DAVID $17,265.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,265.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR JUDGMENT DISBURSED TO PLAINTIFFS AS FOLLOWS[PLUS COSTS]: RENE GUEVARA:$5000. ADILIA ANDURAY:$4350. ADILIA ANDURAY AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM OF ELISA ROJAS: $400. LETICIA BRENES: $6000 PERSONAL INJURY AND $1515 PROPERTY DAMAGE.
